title: Body shield for thermal and electromagnetic radiation
abstract: A body shield (10) is disclosed for protecting a user from harmful thermal and electromagnetic radiation. The body shield includes a body portion (31) and a cover (32) having sidewalls (80 and 81). The body portion has a multi-layered core (11) which is surrounded by an outer casing (12). The multi-layered core includes a first layer (14) of a magnetic metal alloy for shielding extremely low frequency electromagnetic radiation, a second layer (15) of a carbon based material for absorbing higher frequency electromagnetic radiation, and a third layer (16) of a non-magnetic material for conducting higher frequency electromagnetic radiation. The core may be incorporated into a body portion coupled to the device, a cover overlaying the device, or both.
claims:
Claims 1. A body shield for shielding a person from thermal and electromagnetic radiation from a portable electronic device, the body shield comprising, an outer covering having a core and an outer casing encasing said core, said outer covering including a central portion configured to removably overlay a top surface of the portable electronic device and at least one sidewall extending from said central portion configured to overlay a side surface of the portable electronic device, said core including a first layer having a material composition for shielding extremely low frequency electromagnetic radiation, a second layer having a material composition for absorbing higher frequency electromagnetic radiation. 2. The body shield of claim 1 wherein said outer covering at least one sidewall includes two sidewalls extending from opposite side edges of said central portion. 3. The body shield of claim 1 wherein said core extends past the periphery of the portable electronic device. 4. The body shield of claim 1 wherein said outer covering also includes a bottom portion configured to overlay a bottom surface of the portable electronic device. 5. The body shield of claim 1 wherein said core further includes a third layer having a material composition for conducting higher frequency electromagnetic radiation. 6. The body shield of claim 1 wherein said core first layer is a magnetic metal alloy. 7. The body shield of claim 1 wherein said core second layer is a carbon based material. 8. The body shield of claim 5 wherein said core third layer is a non-magnetic metal foil. 9. The body shield of claim 8 wherein said core third layer non-magnetic metal foil is an aluminum foil. 10. A body shield for shielding a person from thermal and electromagnetic radiation from a portable electronic device, the body shield comprising, an outer covering having a core and an outer casing encasing said core, said outer covering including a central portion configured to removably overlay a top surface of the portable electronic device and at least one sidewall extending from said central portion configured to overlay a side surface of the portable electronic device, said core including a first layer having a material composition for shielding extremely low frequency 

 electromagnetic radiation, a second layer having a material composition for conducting higher frequency electromagnetic radiation. 11. The body shield of claim 10 wherein said outer covering at least one sidewall includes two sidewalls extending from opposite side edges of said central portion. 12. The body shield of claim 10 wherein said core extends past the periphery of the portable electronic device. 13. The body shield of claim 10 further comprising a bottom portion configured to overlay a bottom of the portable electronic device. 14. The body shield of claim 10 wherein said core further includes a third layer having a material composition for absorbing higher frequency electromagnetic radiation. 15. The body shield of claim 10 wherein said core first layer is a magnetic metal alloy. 16. The body shield of claim 11 wherein said core third layer is a carbon based material. 17. The body shield of claim 10 wherein said core second layer is a non-magnetic metal foil. 18. The body shield of claim 15 wherein said core second layer non-magnetic metal foil is an aluminum foil. 19. A body shield for shielding a person from thermal and electromagnetic radiation from a portable electronic device, the body shield comprising, a body portion configured to fit about and hold the portable electronic device, and an outer covering pivotally coupled to said body portion, said outer covering having a first portion and a second portion pivotally coupled to said first portion, one said portion of said first and second portion including a central portion and a first sidewall extending from the central portion, said central portion having a core and an outer casing overlaying said core, said core including a first layer having a material composition for shielding extremely low frequency electromagnetic radiation, a second layer having a material composition for absorbing higher frequency electromagnetic radiation. 20. The body shield of claim 19 wherein said one said portion of said first and second portion further comprises a second sidewall extending from said central portion opposite said first sidewall. 21. The body shield of claim 19 wherein said core extends past the periphery of the portable electronic device. 22. The body shield of claim 20 wherein both said first and second portions and said sidewall associated with one said portion include a first layer having a material composition for shielding extremely low frequency electromagnetic radiation, a second layer having a material composition for absorbing higher frequency electromagnetic radiation. 23. The body shield of claim 19 wherein said core further includes a third layer having a material composition for conducting higher frequency electromagnetic radiation. 24. A body shield for shielding a person from thermal and electromagnetic radiation from a portable electronic device, the body shield comprising, a body portion configured to fit about and hold the portable electronic device, and an outer covering pivotally coupled to said body portion, said outer covering having a first portion and a second portion pivotally coupled to said first portion, one said portion of said first and second portion including a central portion and a first sidewall extending from the central portion, said central portion having a core and an outer casing overlaying said core, said core including a first layer having a material composition for shielding extremely low frequency electromagnetic radiation, a second layer having a material composition for conducting higher frequency electromagnetic radiation. 25. The body shield of claim 24 wherein said core extends past the periphery of the portable electronic device. 26. A body shield for shielding a person from thermal and electromagnetic radiation from portable electronic devices, the body shield comprising, a body portion having a core and an outer casing overlaying said core, said core including a first layer having a material composition for shielding extremely low frequency electromagnetic radiation, a second layer having a material composition for absorbing higher frequency electromagnetic radiation 27. The body shield of claim 26 further comprising a cover pivotally coupled to said body portion and configured to overlay the portable electronic device. 28. The body shield of claim 26 wherein said core further includes a third layer having a material composition for conducting higher frequency electromagnetic radiation. 29. The body shield of claim 26 wherein said core first layer is a magnetic metal alloy. 30. The body shield of claim 26 wherein said core second layer is a carbon based material. 31. The body shield of claim 28 wherein said core third layer is a non-magnetic metal foil. 32. The body shield of claim 31 wherein said core third layer non-magnetic metal foil is an aluminum foil. 33. A body shield for shielding a person from thermal and electromagnetic radiation from portable electronic devices, the body shield comprising, a body portion having a core and an outer casing overlaying said core, said core including a first layer having a material composition for shielding extremely low frequency electromagnetic radiation, a second layer having a material composition for conducting higher frequency electromagnetic radiation. 34. The body shield of claim 33 further comprising a cover pivotally coupled to said body portion and configured to overlay the portable electronic device. 35. The body shield of claim 34 wherein said core further includes a third layer having a material composition for absorbing higher frequency electromagnetic radiation. 36. The body shield of claim 34 wherein said core first layer is a magnetic metal alloy. 37. The body shield of claim 35 wherein said core third layer is a carbon based material. 38. The body shield of claim 34 wherein said core second layer is a non-magnetic metal foil. 39. The body shield of claim 38 wherein said core second layer non-magnetic metal foil is an aluminum foil. 40. A body shield for shielding a person from thermal and electromagnetic radiation from portable electronic devices, the body shield comprising, a body portion configured to fit about and hold the portable electronic device, and a cover pivotally coupled to said body portion and adapted to move between a position covering the portable electronic device and a position uncovering the portable electronic device, said cover having a core and an outer casing overlaying said core, said core including a first layer having a material composition for shielding extremely low frequency electromagnetic radiation, a second layer having a material composition for absorbing higher frequency electromagnetic radiation. 41. The body shield of claim 40 wherein said core further includes a third layer having a material composition for conducting higher frequency electromagnetic radiation. 42. The body shield of claim 40 wherein said core first layer is a magnetic metal alloy. 43. The body shield of claim 40 wherein said core second layer is a carbon based material. 44. The body shield of claim 41 wherein said core third layer is a non-magnetic metal foil. 45. The body shield of claim 44 wherein said core third layer non-magnetic metal foil is an aluminum foil. 46. A body shield for shielding a person from thermal and electromagnetic radiation from portable electronic devices, the body shield comprising, a body portion configured to fit about and hold the portable electronic device, and a cover pivotally coupled to said body portion and adapted to move between a position covering the portable electronic device and a position uncovering the portable electronic device, said cover having a core and an outer casing overlaying said core, said core including a first layer having a material composition for shielding extremely low frequency electromagnetic radiation, a second layer having a material composition for conducting higher frequency electromagnetic radiation. 47. The body shield of claim 46 wherein said core further includes a third layer having a material composition for absorbing higher frequency electromagnetic radiation. 48. The body shield of claim 46 wherein said core first layer is a magnetic metal alloy. 49. The body shield of claim 47 wherein said core third layer is a carbon based material. 50. The body shield of claim 46 wherein said core second layer is a non-magnetic metal foil. 51. The body shield of claim 50 wherein said core second layer non-magnetic metal foil is an aluminum foil. 52. A body shield for shielding a person from thermal and electromagnetic radiation from portable electronic devices, the body shield comprising, a core including a first layer having a material composition for shielding extremely low frequency electromagnetic radiation, a second layer having a material composition for absorbing higher frequency electromagnetic radiation, and a third layer having a material composition for reflecting higher frequency electromagnetic radiation, and 

 an outer casing encasing said core, said outer casing having a generally thermal resistant material top layer overlaying said core and a generally thermal resistant material bottom layer underlying said core. 53. The body shield of claim 52 wherein said outer casing top layer is softer than said outer casing bottom layer. 54. The body shield of claim 52 wherein said outer casing bottom layer is stiffer than said outer casing top layer. 55. The body shield of claim 52 wherein said core first layer is a magnetic metal alloy. 56. The body shield of claim 55 wherein said core first layer magnetic metal alloy is at least 80 percent nickel and iron. 57. The body shield of claim 52 wherein said core second layer is a carbon based material. 58. The body shield of claim 57 wherein said core second layer carbon based material is a carbon fiber lamination. 59. The body shield of claim 52 wherein said core third layer is a non-magnetic metal foil. 60. The body shield of claim 59 wherein said core third layer non-magnetic metal foil is an aluminum foil. 61. The body shield of claim 52 wherein said core third layer reflects the higher frequency electromagnetic radiation in a direction back toward said core second layer 62. The body shield of claim 52 wherein said core first layer is a magnetic metal alloy, said core second layer is a carbon based material, and said core third layer is a nonmagnetic metal foil. 63. A body shield for shielding a person from thermal and electromagnetic radiation from electronic devices, the body shield comprising, a casing top layer; a first electromagnetic shielding layer for shielding extremely low frequency electromagnetic radiation; a second electromagnetic shielding layer for absorbing higher frequency electromagnetic radiation; a third electromagnetic shielding layer for reflecting higher frequency electromagnetic 

 radiation, and a casing bottom layer. 64. The body shield of claim 63 wherein said third electromagnetic shielding layer is positioned over said bottom layer, said second electromagnetic shielding layer is positioned over said third electromagnetic shielding layer, said first electromagnetic shielding layer is positioned over said second electromagnetic shielding layer, and said top layer is positioned over said first electromagnetic shielding layer. 65. The body shield of claim 63 wherein said top layer is softer than said bottom layer. 66. The body shield of claim 63 wherein said bottom layer is stiffer than said top layer. 67. The body shield of claim 63 wherein said core first electromagnetic shielding layer is a magnetic metal alloy. 68. The body shield of claim 67 wherein said first electromagnetic shielding layer magnetic metal alloy is at least 80 percent nickel and iron. 69. The body shield of claim 63 wherein said second electromagnetic shielding layer is a carbon based material. 70. The body shield of claim 69 wherein said second electromagnetic shielding layer carbon based material is a carbon fiber lamination. 71. The body shield of claim 63 wherein said third electromagnetic shielding layer is a non-magnetic metal foil. 72. The body shield of claim 71 wherein said third electromagnetic shielding layer non-magnetic metal foil is an aluminum foil. 73. The body shield of claim 63 wherein said third electromagnetic shielding layer reflects the higher frequency electromagnetic radiation in a direction back toward said second layer 74. The body shield of claim 63 wherein said first electromagnetic shielding layer is a magnetic metal alloy, said second electromagnetic shielding layer is a carbon based material, and said third electromagnetic shielding layer is a non-magnetic metal foil. 75. The body shield of claim 63 wherein either said casing top layer or said casing bottom layer is made of a generally thermal resistant material. 76. The body shield of claim 63 wherein said casing top layer and said casing bottom layer are made of a generally thermal resistant material.
